resources.string:
This is the MusPlay Help screen.

- Swipe left/right on the bars to navigate.
- Click on a bar to play its content.
- Use the drawers for more options.

MusPlay v1.0

A clean, gesture-driven music player built with Java.

Developed by Antigravity.

A clean, gesture-driven music player built with Java.

Developed by Antigravity.
No MP3 files found on your device.
Permission denied. Storage access is required to play music.
